scripts.electron:build:all: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --win && npm run postbuild:cleanup
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --win && npm run postbuild:cleanup
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --win && npm run postbuild:cleanup
scripts.release:mac: npm version patch && npm run build && electron-builder --mac && npm run postbuild:cleanup
scripts.release:win: npm version patch && npm run build && electron-builder --win && npm run postbuild:cleanup
